slides.body: Slidewright compiles content into native editable slides and verifies the formatting contract before delivery.
slides.callout: The editable artifact—not the screenshot—is the product.

slides.title: AI slide generation should eliminate cleanup, not relocate it

left.heading: Typical output
left.body: Uneven margins, arbitrary type sizes, clipped copy, flattened visuals, and formatting that breaks after the first edit.

right.heading: Slidewright output
right.body: Symmetric geometry, integer type scales, deterministic text fitting, native rich text, and an evidence bundle for every build.

slides.eyebrow: A formatting contract you can inspect
slides.body: Each build emits exact geometry, fit decisions, rendered previews, and an OOXML audit of editability and typography.
slides.callout: If content cannot fit above the quality floor, Slidewright fails with a useful fix instead of silently shrinking.
